intro: Over an 18-article span from April 13 to 2026, ZCyberNews tracked privilege-escalation activity that included 2 critical and 15 high-severity incidents. Threat actor Chaotic Eclipse was observed, while the most frequently cited vulnerabilities were CVE-2026-40372 (CVSS 9.1), CVE-2026-5490 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2026-6406 (CVSS 8.8), CVE-2026-25203 (CVSS 7.8), and CVE-2026-33104 (CVSS 7.8). Affected sectors spanned technology, education, enterprise, healthcare, and digital signage, with impacts reported globally.
